descriptionOverride: Check if Telco Works is open. Returns current Brisbane time, day, and isBusinessHours (true = 8:30am–5pm Mon–Fri AEST). Call this BEFORE your greeting at the start of every call. Determines whether telcoworksWarmTransfer is available. Do not tell the caller the time unless they ask.

Text the caller a single SMS with a link to browse Telco Works's available 1300 or 1800 numbers. Use this at the end of a sales call when the caller chooses self-setup. Always ask permission and confirm the mobile number before triggering.

Transfer a caller to Telco Works staff via conference bridge. Staff hears a prompt and presses 1 to accept. Only use when the caller explicitly asks to speak to someone AND telcoworksBusinessHours returned isBusinessHours: true. Returns connected: true (caller is with staff, you're done) or connected: false (follow the fallback cascade in your prompt).

Text the caller a Telco Works YouTube walkthrough video link via SMS. Use when the caller asks how to do something self-service in the portal. Pass the video title — the server fuzzy-matches it to the right URL. Only offer a video for topics in the Available Videos list in your prompt; for others, assist conversationally or take a message. Always ask permission before sending.
